question: Find the user details for user ID 42.
golden_sql: SELECT id, username, email, created_at, status FROM users WHERE id = 42;
description: Simple single row lookup by primary key

question: List all products in the Electronics category.
golden_sql: SELECT id, name, price, stock_quantity FROM products WHERE category = 'Electronics';
description: Simple equality filter on categorical column

question: Show all orders with a pending status.
golden_sql: SELECT id, user_id, amount, order_date, status FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending';
description: Lookup orders matching status enum value

question: Get the email address for customer 'john_doe'.
golden_sql: SELECT email FROM users WHERE username = 'john_doe';
description: Single attribute projection lookup

question: List top 10 products sorted by price ascending.
golden_sql: SELECT id, name, price FROM products ORDER BY price ASC LIMIT 10;
description: Simple query with ORDER BY ASC and LIMIT

question: Find products with stock quantity equal to zero.
golden_sql: SELECT id, name, category FROM products WHERE stock_quantity = 0;
description: Out-of-stock lookup filter

question: Show the details of order ID 1001.
golden_sql: SELECT id, user_id, amount, status, order_date FROM orders WHERE id = 1001;
description: Order primary key lookup

question: List all active user accounts.
golden_sql: SELECT id, username, email FROM users WHERE status = 'active';
description: Status equality filter on users

question: Show products priced over $500.
golden_sql: SELECT id, name, category, price FROM products WHERE price > 500;
description: Numeric threshold filter

question: Find the order with shipping address zip code 90210.
golden_sql: SELECT id, user_id, amount, shipping_zip FROM orders WHERE shipping_zip = '90210';
description: String attribute equality filter

question: List all orders along with the customer username and email.
golden_sql: SELECT o.id AS order_id, u.username, u.email, o.amount, o.order_date FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id;
description: Two-table INNER JOIN between orders and users

question: Show all items purchased in order ID 500 with product names.
golden_sql: SELECT oi.order_id, p.name AS product_name, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE oi.order_id = 500;
description: JOIN between line items and product catalog

question: Find users who have placed at least one completed order.
golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT u.id, u.username, u.email FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = 'completed';
description: JOIN with DISTINCT filter

question: List all registered users and their total number of orders, including users with 0 orders.
golden_sql: SELECT u.id, u.username, COUNT(o.id) AS total_orders FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.id, u.username;
description: LEFT OUTER JOIN with GROUP BY for zero-count inclusion

question: Show the product names and quantities bought by user 'alice_smith'.
golden_sql: SELECT p.name AS product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE u.username = 'alice_smith' GROUP BY p.name;
description: Four-table multi-JOIN aggregation

question: Find products that have never been ordered.
golden_sql: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.category FROM products p LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.id IS NULL;
description: LEFT JOIN NULL check anti-join pattern

question: List orders containing products in the 'Books' category.
golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT o.id AS order_id, o.user_id, o.amount FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE p.category = 'Books';
description: Three-table JOIN filtering on product category

question: Show total spend per customer with username and email.
golden_sql: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, SUM(o.amount) AS total_spend FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.email ORDER BY total_spend DESC;
description: JOIN aggregation with ORDER BY DESC

question: Find customer details for orders placed in status 'refunded'.
golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT u.id, u.username, u.email, o.id AS order_id FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = 'refunded';
description: JOIN with specific status filter

question: List user accounts that have placed orders over $1000.
golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT u.id, u.username, u.email FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.amount > 1000;
description: JOIN with threshold filter

question: What is the total revenue by product category?
golden_sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
description: Category GROUP BY with SUM calculation

question: Find top 5 customers by total order count.
golden_sql: SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 5;
description: Customer order count aggregation with LIMIT 5

question: Calculate the average order value across all completed orders.
golden_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(amount), 2) AS avg_order_value FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed';
description: Global aggregate AVG with ROUND

question: Show order count grouped by order status.
golden_sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS status_count FROM orders GROUP BY status;
description: Enum column distribution GROUP BY

question: Find categories having more than 50 total products.
golden_sql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS product_count FROM products GROUP BY category HAVING COUNT(*) > 50;
description: GROUP BY with HAVING filter clause

question: What is the maximum and minimum order amount?
golden_sql: SELECT MAX(amount) AS max_amount, MIN(amount) AS min_amount FROM orders;
description: Combined MAX and MIN aggregate calculation

question: Show total sales volume and quantity per product.
golden_sql: SELECT product_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_units_sold, SUM(quantity * unit_price) AS total_sales FROM order_items GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
description: Product level multi-metric aggregate

question: Find customers who placed more than 3 orders.
golden_sql: SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM orders GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 3;
description: Customer grouping with HAVING filter

question: Calculate total number of registered users.
golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_users FROM users;
description: Global count calculation

question: Show average product price by category.
golden_sql: SELECT category, ROUND(AVG(price), 2) AS avg_price FROM products GROUP BY category ORDER BY avg_price DESC;
description: Product category average price grouping

question: What is the total revenue for the current month?
golden_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND status = 'completed';
description: Date math filter using DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)

question: List orders placed in the last 30 days.
golden_sql: SELECT id, user_id, amount, order_date, status FROM orders WHERE order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days';
description: Relative date interval filter (INTERVAL 30 days)

question: Show orders created between 2024-01-01 and 2024-03-31.
golden_sql: SELECT id, user_id, amount, order_date FROM orders WHERE order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND order_date <= '2024-03-31';
description: Explicit date range filter using ISO strings

question: Find users who registered in the year 2023.
golden_sql: SELECT id, username, email, created_at FROM users WHERE created_at >= '2023-01-01' AND created_at < '2024-01-01';
description: Annual registration timestamp filter

question: Show monthly sales total for 2024.
golden_sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS sales_month, SUM(amount) AS monthly_sales FROM orders WHERE order_date >= '2024-01-01' AND order_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY sales_month ORDER BY sales_month ASC;
description: Monthly truncation grouping for a specific calendar year

question: Find orders placed today.
golden_sql: SELECT id, user_id, amount, status FROM orders WHERE order_date >= CURRENT_DATE;
description: Current date filter

question: Show orders created in Q2 2024.
golden_sql: SELECT id, user_id, amount, order_date FROM orders WHERE order_date >= '2024-04-01' AND order_date < '2024-07-01';
description: Quarterly date range filter

question: List orders placed in the last 7 days.
golden_sql: SELECT id, user_id, amount, order_date FROM orders WHERE order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days';
description: 7-day rolling date interval filter

question: Find users who signed up in the last 24 hours.
golden_sql: SELECT id, username, email, created_at FROM users WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';
description: Timestamp interval filter using NOW()

question: Show orders completed in December 2023.
golden_sql: SELECT id, user_id, amount, order_date FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed' AND order_date >= '2023-12-01' AND order_date < '2024-01-01';
description: Specific month and status filter combination

question: Show revenue for this month.
golden_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND status = 'completed';
description: Ambiguous revenue phrasing (Gross vs Net revenue clarification needed)

question: Who are our best customers?
golden_sql: SELECT user_id, SUM(amount) AS total_spend FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed' GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 10;
description: Ambiguous best customer definition (highest spend vs highest order count)

question: List active users.
golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT u.id, u.username FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days';
description: Ambiguous active user definition (recent registration vs recent order placement)

question: What is our top product?
golden_sql: SELECT product_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_units FROM order_items GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY total_units DESC LIMIT 1;
description: Ambiguous top product metric (most units sold vs highest total revenue generated)

question: Show sales growth.
golden_sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS month, SUM(amount) AS revenue FROM orders GROUP BY month ORDER BY month ASC;
description: Ambiguous sales growth request (MoM revenue trend vs YoY growth percentage)

question: Show churned customers.
golden_sql: SELECT u.id, u.username FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id AND o.order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' WHERE o.id IS NULL;
description: Ambiguous customer churn threshold (no order in 60 vs 90 vs 180 days)

description: Unsafe DML write operation that must be blocked by security guardrail

description: Unanswerable question referencing non-existent employee/salary database tables

description: Unanswerable out-of-domain question with no matching schema entities

question: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM orders t1) t2) t3) t4);
description: Query exceeding max subquery depth limit (depth 4 > allowed max 3)
